rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MYNA B. HUGHES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
rulings.Rulings: Endorsed filed copy of the trust petition must be delivered to the probate examiners in room 202 prior to matter being reviewed. A proposed order has also not been submitted. In addition direct notices have not been provided (notice to attorneys and c/o notices are insufficient). Continued to 8/12/14. A further continuance should be requested if waivers of notice cannot be obtained.
